title: cerasus × shirataki
intro: Cerasus × shirataki is a hybrid plant between Prunus cerasus (sour cherry) and Prunus serrulata (Japanese cherry), commonly known as the Shirataki cherry or Japanese sour cherry. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and other polyphenols, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cerasus × shirataki include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In traditional herbal medicine, Cerasus × shirataki is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts may also be used in capsule or tablet form to leverage its medicinal properties.
